# kannanokannan AI Governance Stack

Open-source AI governance architecture for placing probabilistic intelligence inside deterministic governance boundaries.

## Website

- AI Governance Stack landing page: https://kannanokannan.github.io/

## Core Repositories

- ContextOps: https://github.com/kannanokannan/ContextOps
- ContextBoundary: https://github.com/kannanokannan/ContextBoundary
- Sthala: https://github.com/kannanokannan/Sthala
- Griha: https://github.com/kannanokannan/Griha
- context-stack: https://github.com/kannanokannan/context-stack

## Summary

The stack presents a governance-first approach to AI systems: probabilistic intelligence is useful, but production systems need deterministic boundaries, explicit context handling, and operational controls.
